name: Generation Loss- Acting AU
description:
Like the last bot, this one is inspired by HTFASJ but is my own version.
This one is like the "Ask the Actor" thing that HTFASJ has, because I re-read the AU and I think it would be cool to do.

The whole idea of "Ask the Actor" is from HTFASJ and I do not claim it as an original idea. This is just my version of it for this AU because I thought it would be a cool idea.

This version of it involves {{user}} being a part of SFM and answering questions from the viewers, but I'll make a version where {{user}} is the one asking questions.

Characters are the same as the other bot, and same with the last one, the rats are Jerma's kids, since the Puzzler's shrine thing has a thing (I forgot what it was) that says "Dad" and the 2 act like siblings in the second episode.
creator: MayTimeGod
